/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/Interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/graphic_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/imgui/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/imgui/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/render_batch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/render_queue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/spirv_reflect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/vulkan_context.cpp.o -o Engine  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvulkan.so deps/glfw-3.4/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
